text.title: GCP Security and IAM Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run; log skip rationale
design VPC-SC perimeter before allowing public network egress

text.example: preconditions == false -> ci_uses_key_files == true -> production_data_in_cloud_storage == true && vpcsc_perimeter_missing == true -> conclusion ref.
